headline: Solstice (SOLS) Q1 2026 Earnings Transcript
summary: David Sewell: Thank you, Mike, and thank you, everyone, for joining us today. headline: Solstice Advanced Materials (SOLS) declines after softer full-year revenue outlook
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials (NASDAQ:SOLS) fell more than 4% on Wednesday after the company issued full-year revenue guidance that came in below Wall Street expectations, despite reporting first-quarter results broadly in line with forecasts. The specialty materials producer posted adjusted earnings per share of $0.

headline: Solstice Advanced Materials Ties AI Cooling And Nuclear Fuel To Valuation
summary: Solstice Advanced Materials is drawing attention for its role in AI, nuclear energy, and semiconductor supply chains. The company is supplying proprietary cooling solutions for AI compute infrastructure. Solstice holds a sovereign monopoly in U.S. uranium conversion, tying its business to critical nuclear fuel needs. The company is positioned within onshoring efforts in advanced semiconductor materials. Solstice Advanced Materials (NasdaqGS:SOLS) sits at the junction of AI data centers,...
